zh-CN.label: 高置信度
zh-CN.body: 你的作答节奏和一致性支持正常解读。
zh-CN.user_guidance: 具体分数仍应作为区间参考。 具体分数仍应作为区间参考。
zh-CN.retest_note: 按当前建议练习即可，复测可用于观察变化。
zh-CN.why_this_level: 你的作答节奏和一致性支持正常解读。
zh-CN.how_to_read: 可以重点阅读核心模式、维度分布和行动处方。
zh-CN.what_to_trust: 具体分数仍应作为区间参考。
zh-CN.what_to_hold_lightly: 具体分数仍应作为区间参考。

en.label: High confidence
en.body: Your pace and consistency support a normal interpretation.
en.user_guidance: Specific numbers should still be treated as approximate. Specific numbers should still be treated as approximate.
en.retest_note: Use the current recommendations and retest later to observe change.
en.why_this_level: Your pace and consistency support a normal interpretation.
en.how_to_read: Focus on the core pattern, dimension profile, and action prescription.
en.what_to_trust: Specific numbers should still be treated as approximate.
en.what_to_hold_lightly: Specific numbers should still be treated as approximate.

zh-CN.label: 正常置信度
zh-CN.body: 整体可读，但部分回答可能受当时状态影响。
zh-CN.user_guidance: 不要过度解释一两个维度的小分差。 不要过度解释一两个维度的小分差。
zh-CN.retest_note: 若结果和体验差距较大，可在状态稳定时复测。
zh-CN.why_this_level: 整体可读，但部分回答可能受当时状态影响。
zh-CN.how_to_read: 可以相信主要方向，轻看细小差异。
zh-CN.what_to_trust: 不要过度解释一两个维度的小分差。
zh-CN.what_to_hold_lightly: 不要过度解释一两个维度的小分差。

en.label: Standard confidence
en.body: The result is readable, though some answers may reflect your state at the time.
en.user_guidance: Do not overinterpret tiny dimension gaps. Do not overinterpret tiny dimension gaps.
en.retest_note: If the result feels far from your experience, retest in a steadier state.
en.why_this_level: The result is readable, though some answers may reflect your state at the time.
en.how_to_read: Trust the broad direction and hold small differences lightly.
en.what_to_trust: Do not overinterpret tiny dimension gaps.
en.what_to_hold_lightly: Do not overinterpret tiny dimension gaps.

zh-CN.label: 谨慎阅读
zh-CN.body: 作答模式提示解释稳定性下降。
zh-CN.user_guidance: 不要把本次 formulation 当成强结论。 不要把本次 formulation 当成强结论。
zh-CN.retest_note: 建议复测或先回顾作答状态。
zh-CN.why_this_level: 作答模式提示解释稳定性下降。
zh-CN.how_to_read: 可参考质量提示、复测建议和最基础的行动。
zh-CN.what_to_trust: 不要把本次 formulation 当成强结论。
zh-CN.what_to_hold_lightly: 不要把本次 formulation 当成强结论。

en.label: Read with caution
en.body: The response pattern suggests lower interpretive stability.
en.user_guidance: Do not treat the formulation as a strong conclusion. Do not treat the formulation as a strong conclusion.
en.retest_note: Consider retesting or reviewing your answering state first.
en.why_this_level: The response pattern suggests lower interpretive stability.
en.how_to_read: Use the quality note, retest guidance, and simple practices.
en.what_to_trust: Do not treat the formulation as a strong conclusion.
en.what_to_hold_lightly: Do not treat the formulation as a strong conclusion.

zh-CN.label: 低置信度
zh-CN.body: 本次结果不适合做强解释。
zh-CN.user_guidance: 不要使用本次结果作为重大判断依据。 不要使用本次结果作为重大判断依据。
zh-CN.retest_note: 建议在更稳定、不中断的状态下重新完成。
zh-CN.why_this_level: 本次结果不适合做强解释。
zh-CN.how_to_read: 可以查看作答质量说明和复测准备。
zh-CN.what_to_trust: 不要使用本次结果作为重大判断依据。
zh-CN.what_to_hold_lightly: 不要使用本次结果作为重大判断依据。

en.label: Low confidence
en.body: This result is not suitable for strong interpretation.
en.user_guidance: Do not use this result as a basis for major decisions. Do not use this result as a basis for major decisions.
en.retest_note: Retake it in a steadier, uninterrupted setting.
en.why_this_level: This result is not suitable for strong interpretation.
en.how_to_read: Use the quality explanation and retest preparation.
en.what_to_trust: Do not use this result as a basis for major decisions.
en.what_to_hold_lightly: Do not use this result as a basis for major decisions.
